hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then ext="${FILE##*.}"; if [ "$ext" = "ts" ] || [ "$ext" = "tsx" ]; then case "$FILE" in */mcp-server/*) npx tsc --noEmit -p mcp-server 2>&1 | head -20;; */cli/*) npx tsc --noEmit -p cli 2>&1 | head -20;; esac; fi; fi

hooks.prompt: Context was just compacted. Immediately re-read .harness/context_summary.md and run TaskList to recover your current state before continuing work. If this is the third or more compaction in rapid succession and you are losing context each time, STOP: write your current progress and known state to .harness/context_summary.md, message the lead with SendMessage({ type: 'message', recipient: 'team-lead', content: 'Context collapse: repeated compaction losing state. Current feature [ID] progress saved to context_summary.md. Need intervention.' }), then wait for instructions.
